com.irurueta.units

Class AngularAcceleration

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.irurueta.units.Measurement<AngularAccelerationUnit>
      • com.irurueta.units.AngularAcceleration
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable

    public class AngularAcceleration
extends Measurement<AngularAccelerationUnit>
    Contains angular acceleration value and unit.
    See Also:

      Adds provided angular acceleration and updates current angular acceleration.

    • Constructor Detail

      • AngularAcceleration

        public AngularAcceleration(Number value,
                           AngularAccelerationUnit unit)
                    throws IllegalArgumentException
        Constructor with value and unit.
        Parameters:
        value - angular acceleration value.
        unit - unit of angualr acceleration.
        Throws:
        IllegalArgumentException - if either value or unit is null.

      • AngularAcceleration

        AngularAcceleration()
        Constructor.

    • Method Detail

      • equals

        public boolean equals(Measurement<AngularAccelerationUnit> other,
                      double tolerance)
        Determines if two angular acceleration values are equal up to a certain tolerance. If needed, this method attempts unit conversion to compare both objects.
        Overrides:
        equals in class Measurement<AngularAccelerationUnit>
        Parameters:
        other - another measurement to compare.
        tolerance - true if provided measurement is assumed to be equal to this instance up to provided tolerance.
        Returns:
        true if provided angular acceleration is assumed to be equal to this instance, false otherwise.

      • add

        public static double add(double value1,
                         AngularAccelerationUnit unit1,
                         double value2,
                         AngularAccelerationUnit unit2,
                         AngularAccelerationUnit resultUnit)
        Adds two angular acceleration values and units and returns the result.
        Parameters:
        value1 - 1st argument value.
        unit1 - 1st argument unit.
        value2 - 2nd argument value.
        unit2 - 2nd argument unit.
        resultUnit - unit of result to be returned.
        Returns:
        result of addition.

      • addAndReturnNew

        public AngularAcceleration addAndReturnNew(double value,
                                           AngularAccelerationUnit unit,
                                           AngularAccelerationUnit resultUnit)
        Adds provided angular acceleration value and unit and returns a new angular acceleration instance using provided unit.
        Parameters:
        value - value to be added.
        unit - unit of value to be added.
        resultUnit - unit of returned angular acceleration.
        Returns:
        a new angular acceleration containing result.
